description_long: This house features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and a mix of light and dark exterior wall panels. Large horizontal windows dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the main living spaces. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open-plan arrangement, with interior furnishings such as sofas, tables, and beds. The exterior walls are primarily clad in light-colored materials, contrasted by dark accent panels and a sleek, minimalist aesthetic. The house is surrounded by partial fencing and privacy walls, with some greenery visible in the courtyard areas. The overall structure is compact yet spacious, designed for urban living with a focus on privacy and contemporary style.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large horizontal windows, and a mix of light and dark exterior panels. The design emphasizes open-plan living and privacy, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: The front view showcases large horizontal windows, a prominent light-colored facade, and a glimpse into the main living area with visible furnishings.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the rear and side walls, featuring a mix of light and dark panels, and shows the entryway and additional rooms.
description_view_2: The opposite side view emphasizes the long, horizontal privacy fence and the extensive use of glass along the facade.
description_view_3: The back view reveals more of the private courtyard area, additional windows, and the overall compact footprint of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main door with no steps, flush with the facade, and partially sheltered by an overhanging wall panel
